intro: Over the twelve days from 12 to 23 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 61 articles tagged supply-chain, covering 38 high-severity and 9 critical incidents. Threat actors Lazarus Group, CanisterSprawl, and TeamPCP were observed targeting technology, software development, cryptocurrency, logistics, and manufacturing sectors globally, with specific focus on Europe, Asia, and North America. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177.
